Policy Statement: invoice_id must be unique across the entire dataset
quantity must be a positive integer (≥ 1)
price must be greater than zero
country must be one of {Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Chile}
invoice_date must follow YYYY-MM-DD and fall within 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31
customer_id must be non-null positive integer
product must belong to the allowed catalog
